backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the coffee cupping app, defining data types (user profiles, cafe profiles, cupping submissions, QR codes) and storage maps, with helper functions for ID generation and access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—fixing the `useIsAdmin` React Query hook and updating Admin Dashboard tab visibility in HomePage—to their relevant files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose of each component, hook, page, and configuration file in the project.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the My Cup PWA, including viewport meta tags, Apple/PWA meta tags, app icons, and the root div with the main TypeScript module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles authentication state, conditionally shows a profile setup modal for new users, and wraps the app in ThemeProvider with Header, Footer, and HomePage.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component that fetches and displays daily stats for the last 7 days as summary cards and a bar chart, with a detailed table using Recharts and shadcn/ui components.
frontend/src/components/CafeDashboard.ts: Cafe owner dashboard for managing free cups quota, adding/removing coffees, viewing average cupping scores via a radar chart, and exporting cupping data as CSV.
frontend/src/components/CafeDetailDialog: Modal dialog that displays cafe details and available coffees, allowing users to reserve a free cup by generating a QR code reservation ID.
frontend/src/components/CuppingForm.tsx: Form component for submitting coffee cupping evaluations, including score sliders for 10 categories, intensity levels, QR code input, and optional photo upload.
frontend/src/components/CuppingRadarChar: Renders a radar/spider chart visualizing CoffeeScores across 10 cupping categories using Recharts with styled tooltips and a gradient fill.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with a logo and authentication controls, showing a user avatar dropdown with logout when authenticated or a login button otherwise.
frontend/src/components/MapView.tsx: Displays a grid of participating cafe cards with photos, roast level, and free cup availability, opening a CafeDetailDialog on selection.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Blocking modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and creates an initial user profile with default cupping stats.
frontend/src/components/QRCodeScanner.ts: React component that uses the camera to scan QR codes and redeems them via the `useRedeemQRCode` mutation, displaying scan status and redemption feedback with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/UserProfile.tsx: React component that displays a user's coffee cupping profile including level, completed cuppings, accuracy, and progress, along with a radar chart of their latest cupping session.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for interacting with the ICP backend actor, covering user profiles, cafe profiles, coffees, cuppings, QR codes, and daily stats via queries and mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's color system using OKLCH-style values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main authenticated home page that renders a tabbed interface with Map, Profile, Cupping, QR Scanner, and conditionally Cafe Dashboard and Admin Dashboard tabs based on user role. Handles deep links via sessionStorage and guards the admin tab using the `useIsAdmin` hook.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with oklch-based design tokens for colors, border radius, box shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording existing features, known issues (broken admin/founder recognition flow), and new feature requests for the 'My Cup' React Native/web app with an admin dashboard.
